'''Elias Halbert''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who worked for [[Abdi-Badawzi]].

==Biography==
In his youth, he was a reputable freighter [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], but he fell victim to [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] and [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholism]] and had to take up a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] career to pay off his many debts. He was known for losing crew members, valuable cargo, and even entire [[Starship/Legends|ships]].

He employed the mischievous but technically skilled [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Squig (Jawa)|Squig]] as his very unreliable [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]]. He was known to pilot the ''[[Seldom Different]]'' for Abdi-Badawzi.
